rationale.ai-review: Apollo independently, adversarially judges milestone completion; production and judgment separated
rationale.rules-based-checks: verification grounded in executable tests, CI results, OJ scoring
rationale.remediation-gating: budget-halving bounded fix loop, exponential decay, fail-closed autonomous correction
rationale.hitl-workflow: async pause/resume plus emergency bootstrap reset as human control levers
rationale.oversight-explanation: dashboard live-streams agent reasoning so humans understand how decisions reached
rationale.framework: open-source reusable multi-agent orchestration pipeline architecture
rationale.built-system: implemented in Node.js, deployed on four real projects
rationale.agentic: AI-initiated multi-step autonomous development delivered at artifact granularity
rationale.risk-quality: verification mitigates defects/regressions; RQ3 empirically characterizes quality defects caught
